name: Field
$molecule: FIRST non-atom PoC. Demonstrates deep composition (5+ levels) and INSTANCE_SWAP exposedProp at molecule level.
description: Form-field molecule. Wraps an input mechanism (default: InputGroup, swappable via inputType prop) with label, helper/description, and optional link slot. Maps to shadcn/ui Input-with-Label pattern.

variantConstraints.reason: Responsive layout doesn't support Description Placement = Under Label. Cell count: 6 not 8.

exposedProps.name: link
exposedProps.description: Reveal link slot (top-right of label row).

exposedProps.name: inputType
exposedProps.description: Input mechanism to embed. NULL renders the default InputGroup. First PoC component to use INSTANCE_SWAP at molecule level — consumers can swap in any compatible input atom or molecule.

slots.name: input
slots.$role: Default: nested InputGroup (sub-molecule). Consumers swap via inputType prop.

responsiveOrientation.$comment: Orientation=Responsive switches to HORIZONTAL with label + input on same row. Walk-cell pending. Height drops 100 → 46.
responsiveOrientation.$tbdStep3: Responsive cell 18707:231727 not yet walked in full.

label-fill.$confirmed: Walked 18684:15221 (False) + 18692:40259 (True). Only label color shifts on Invalid.

description-fill.$invalidNote: Description does NOT shift to destructive on Invalid. Confirmed via cell 18692:40259.
description-fill.$auditFinding: F20 candidate: Apollo v2 may want description to shift to destructive on Invalid (parallel to standard form-field error pattern). Source-DS audit.

input-state.$comment: Nested InputGroup's state is NOT obviously propagated from Field's dataInvalid axis. Codegen output for Invalid cell shows InputGroup with default border/colors.
input-state.$auditFindingF20: Field's dataInvalid=True visually changes only the label (red). The nested InputGroup keeps Default border + colors. EITHER Apollo intended only label-level invalidness signal (incomplete) OR the Invalid cell should pass `state=Invalid` to the InputGroup as an instance override (Figma feature). Codegen doesn't reveal the override; needs use_figma plugin inspection.

uses.name: InputGroup
uses.$role: default input mechanism — wraps Input atom with optional inline addons (Lucide Search + KbdGroup ⌘F)

composition.$depth: 5+ levels — Field → InputGroup → AddonInline → KbdGroup → Kbd → Lucide-Arrow. Deepest PoC composition.
composition.$sp8Note: SP-8 nested-instance-token unioning: Field's token surface is the UNION of Field-level + InputGroup + AddonInline + KbdGroup + Kbd tokens. Bundle's tokens.json carries 25 tokens with most contributed by nested instances.

a11y.role: group (form-field wrapper); inner input retains its own role
a11y.labelAssociation: <label htmlFor={input.id}> + matching id on input element

ariaInvalid.True: true (renderer applies to inner input element)

a11y.ariaDescribedby: Renderer connects description text id to inner input's aria-describedby — Apollo source doesn't encode this; renderer responsibility.
a11y.$ariaPropagationNote: F20-related: if Field.dataInvalid=True intends to fully invalidate, renderer must propagate to inner input's aria-invalid + (typically) red border.

verificationFailures.auditFinding: F21 (NEW): Same #with-label fragment issue as Input (F12). Carries the typo at molecule level. Pattern: Apollo v2 sets `#with-label` as the default Input doc fragment, which is wrong for the bare Input atom AND not quite right for Field either.

$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F20: NEW (MEDIUM). Field dataInvalid=True only shifts label color to destructive. Inner InputGroup keeps default border + colors. Description stays muted. Either incomplete invalidness signal OR codegen-hidden instance-override (use_figma plugin call needed to confirm).
$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F21: NEW (LOW). Field cells carry the same `#with-label` doc-URL fragment typo as Input (F12).
$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F22: NEW (LOW). Responsive orientation lacks Description Placement = Under Label. Asymmetric matrix encoded via variantConstraints (SP-2).

$step2_known_gaps.resolution: Walk 18707:231727 — likely HORIZONTAL layout with label + input on same row

$step2_known_gaps.field: F20 propagation truth — does Field's dataInvalid actually update InputGroup state via Figma instance overrides?
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: use_figma plugin walk of 18692:40259 to inspect override chain

$step2_known_gaps.field: Link slot positioning details on Responsive orientation

v0.2.0: SP-1 — whenVariant filter exercised (descriptionPlacement axis filters which slot order is rendered)
SP-2 — variantConstraints captured Responsive's missing Description=Under-Label cell
SP-4 — $bindingStatus: hardcoded fires on Field container width (433px raw)
SP-8 — DEEP recursion: nested-instance tokens reach 5+ levels (Field → InputGroup → KbdGroup → Kbd → Lucide). Largest SP-8 surface in PoC.

$v0_4_0_candidates: SP-10 (candidate, MEDIUM): variant-override propagation chain. Field's dataInvalid axis SHOULD propagate to nested InputGroup's state axis. Spec needs to capture override chains explicitly. Currently invisible in MCP codegen — would need use_figma plugin walk.

SP-11 (candidate, LOW): nested-instance variant remapping. When a parent component's variant axis names DIFFER from a child's (Field uses `dataInvalid`, Input uses `state`), the bundle needs an explicit mapping declaration.
